subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath appeared and revealed that which every weary tongue hath spoken, whereby every remote one hath drawn nigh and every sightless one hath seen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ظهر و اظهر ما نطق به کل کلیل و تقرب کل بعید و رای کل ضریر و اقبل
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
